name: Mobile 01
prompt: High-angle selfie, camera held above head level, slight chin down, looking up at the lens with big eyes, one shoulder raised.
hint: Селфи сверху, взгляд вверх, одно плечо приподнято.

name: Mobile 02
prompt: Mirror selfie, phone held with both hands partially obscuring the lower face, body angled sideways to accentuate curves.
hint: Селфи в зеркале двумя руками, телефон закрывает часть лица.

name: Mobile 03
prompt: Casual candid selfie, holding phone with one hand, other hand touching face or adjusting hair, relaxed expression.
hint: Случайное селфи, одна рука касается лица или волос.

name: Mobile 04
prompt: Golden hour car selfie, face half-illuminated by sunlight, seatbelt visible across chest, leaning slightly back.
hint: Селфи в машине в «золотой час», виден ремень безопасности.

name: Mobile 05
prompt: 'Follow me' pose from a selfie perspective, arm extended forward holding the camera, body turned back looking over shoulder.
hint: Поза «следуй за мной», взгляд назад через плечо.

name: Mobile 06
prompt: Gym mirror selfie, sitting on a bench or yoga mat, legs crossed, phone held low, showing full body outfit.
hint: Селфи в спортзале сидя, ноги скрещены, телефон внизу.

name: Mobile 07
prompt: Peace sign selfie, holding phone with one hand, the other hand giving a lazy peace sign near the cheek.
hint: Селфи с жестом «виктория» (peace sign) у щеки.

name: Mobile 08
prompt: Lying down selfie, phone held directly above the face, hair spread naturally on the pillow, soft gaze.
hint: Селфи лежа, телефон прямо над лицом, волосы на подушке.

name: Mobile 09
prompt: 'OOTD' mirror selfie, pointing phone at a full-length mirror, one leg propped up on the toe, hips popped sideways.
hint: Селфи «образ дня» в полный рост, одна нога на носке.

name: Mobile 10
prompt: Coffee cup selfie, holding phone with one hand and a coffee cup near the face with the other, capturing the lifestyle vibe.
hint: Селфи с чашкой кофе у лица, лайфстайл-кадр.

name: Mobile 11
prompt: A three-quarter rear-view shot of a character taking a mirror selfie. The character is standing side-profile to the camera, looking at their own reflection. One hand holds a mobile phone at chest level. The pose emphasizes the curve of the lower back and glutes.
hint: Селфи в зеркале, вид сбоку-сзади, акцент на изгибе спины и бедер.

name: Mobile 12
prompt: A medium frontal shot of a woman standing and leaning slightly forward. Her shoulders are slightly hunched, and her gaze is fixed on the camera with a subtle, confident smile.
hint: Средний план, девушка слегка наклонена вперед, уверенный взгляд.

name: Mobile 13
prompt: A medium shot of a woman taking a mirror selfie. She is standing straight, holding a smartphone in her right hand at chest level. Her left hand is resting on her hip. She has a neutral expression and is looking slightly away from the camera.
hint: Селфи в зеркале, рука на бедре, нейтральное выражение лица.

name: Mobile 14
prompt: A medium shot of a woman sitting and leaning back slightly. Her right hand is raised, with fingers delicately touching her hair near the ear. She is looking directly at the camera with a soft, playful smile. The shot is slightly from a side angle.
hint: Девушка сидит, рука касается волос, игривая улыбка.

name: Mobile 15
prompt: A close-up, high-angle shot of a woman's face. She is looking up towards the camera. Her head is tilted slightly to the side, and she has a gentle, serene expression. Her long hair flows down the side of her face.
hint: Крупный план сверху, голова наклонена, спокойное выражение лица.

name: Mobile 16
prompt: A full-body mirror selfie. The woman is standing in an open doorway, leaning against the door frame with her right elbow. She is holding a smartphone in her left hand, covering part of her face. Her right hand is touching her forehead.
hint: Селфи в полный рост, опора на дверной косяк, рука у лба.

name: Mobile 17
prompt: A medium frontal shot of a woman. Her right hand is raised to her chest level, with fingers lightly touching her collarbone. She has a neutral but intense gaze directed at the camera. Her head is tilted slightly.
hint: Средний план, рука у ключицы, пристальный взгляд.

name: Mobile 18
prompt: A full-length shot of a woman walking. She is captured looking down. She is holding a black handbag in her left hand. The camera is at a medium-low angle.
hint: В полный рост (на улице), в движении, взгляд вниз, сумка в руке.

name: Mobile 19
prompt: A medium shot mirror selfie. The woman is standing straight, holding a smartphone in her right hand at eye level. Her left hand is resting on her thigh. She is looking at the phone's screen with a subtle smirk.
hint: Селфи, средний план, рука на бедре.

name: Mobile 20
prompt: A medium frontal shot mirror selfie. The woman is holding a smartphone in her left hand. Her right hand is raised to her chin, with her fingers touching her face. She has red nails and is looking at the phone screen.
hint: Селфи в зеркале, рука у подбородка, яркий маникюр.

name: Mobile 21
prompt: A close-up frontal shot of a woman. She is looking directly at the camera with a neutral expression. Her left hand is raised to her head, with her fingers buried in her hair. The shot is well-lit, highlighting her facial features.
hint: Крупный план, рука в волосах, прямой взгляд.

name: Mobile 22
prompt: A medium shot of a woman sitting on a bed. She is turned slightly to the side, looking at the camera. Her right hand is resting on her chin. She has a soft, calm expression. The camera is at eye level.
hint: Сидя на кровати, рука у подбородка, спокойный взгляд.

name: Mobile 23
prompt: A medium frontal shot of a woman standing. She is looking away from the camera with a gentle smile. Her body is slightly angled to the side.
hint: Взгляд в сторону, легкая улыбка.

name: Mobile 24
prompt: A close-up frontal shot of a woman. She is leaning her chin on her right hand, which is balled into a loose fist. She has a warm, friendly smile and is looking directly at the camera. Sunlight highlights her face and hair.
hint: Крупный план, подбородок на руке, теплая улыбка.

name: Mobile 25
prompt: A close-up, high-angle shot of a woman's face. She is looking up at the camera with a gentle expression. Her hair is blonde and flows down.
hint: Крупный план сверху, взгляд вверх, мягкое выражение лица.

name: Mobile 26
prompt: A medium shot of a woman. She is looking directly at the camera with a neutral expression. Her shoulders are slightly angled.
hint: Средний план, прямой взгляд, нейтральное выражение.

name: Mobile 27
prompt: A medium shot mirror selfie. The woman is holding a smartphone in her right hand. She is looking at her reflection with a slightly open mouth. Her left hand is out of frame.
hint: Селфи в зеркале, взгляд на свое отражение, приоткрытый рот.

name: Mobile 28
prompt: A medium shot of a sitting woman. Her left hand is raised to her neck, with fingers lightly touching her throat. She is looking at the camera with a subtle smile.
hint: Сидя на диване, рука у шеи, легкая улыбка.

name: Mobile 29
prompt: A medium shot of a standing woman. She is leaning with her left arm. She is looking at the camera with a confident expression.
hint: На балконе, опора на перила, уверенный взгляд.
